en.extract:
The northern shriketit (Falcunculus whitei) is a species of bird in the family Falcunculidae.
It is found in the Kimberley region of north-western Australia and the Top End of the Northern Territory.

The '''northern shriketit''' ('''''Falcunculus whitei''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Falcunculidae]].
It is found in the Kimberley region of north-western Australia and the [[Top End]] of the [[Northern Territory]].
